title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TransIndia Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TransIndia Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the TransIndia Logistics family as a Fleet Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TransIndia Logistics:
TransIndia Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TransIndia Logistics!
